trigger.failure: rendererMigrationV2183Parity candidateGateUpstreamHardeningReview normalized length was 6172 on Linux versus the Windows baseline 6152
trigger.passingBeforeFailure: Typecheck and lint passed; 542 test files and 1653 tests passed

scope.goal: Make version-prefixed Java and mini-kv resolved fixture paths normalize identically on Windows and Linux without changing product output.
nonGoals: No source file under src/ changes
No renderer, loader, route, schema, fixture, or upstream contract change
No weakening of section-count or trailing-newline parity assertions
No Java or mini-kv write, build, test, start, or stop
No transition into N5 before external N1-close review

necessityProof.blockerResolved: The final N1 checkpoint CI could not reach build or smoke because two version-prefixed resolved-path lines retained the runner-specific repository root.
necessityProof.consumer: The v2183 frozen renderer parity gate, the v2184 N1 closeout checkpoint, and future renderer migrations that carry versioned sibling evidence paths.
necessityProof.whyExistingNormalizerWasInsufficient: It recognized plain '- Resolved path:' labels but not '- Java v151 resolved path:' or equivalent mini-kv labels.
necessityProof.stopCondition: Windows and LF-checkout probes produce the same normalized length and sha256; dedicated label-matrix tests cover Java, mini-kv, and non-path preservation.

rootCause.reason: The absolute checkout roots had different lengths and the version prefix prevented the existing resolved-path regex from invoking normalizePathValue.

implementation.newRule: Version-prefixed Java/mini-kv resolved path labels are passed to the existing normalizePathValue helper.

validation.command: Render the candidate-gate report in D:/nodeproj/orderops-node and in a detached core.autocrlf=false worktree at b2b1bc05 using the repaired normalizer
validation.result: Both environments produced length 6114 and sha256 96457d87ec3af940e44b759fdcae7ac0d18ae2260ed84c8bb25f7331d5793ec6

focusedCoverageMode.result: 2 files passed, 4 tests passed; command-local zero thresholds were used only because a focused subset cannot satisfy repository-wide coverage floors

lint.result: passed with 0 errors and the unchanged 263-warning baseline

documentationQualityGate.result: 2 files passed, 4 tests passed; walkthrough measured 3013 Chinese characters with compliance score 100

fullSuite.result: 544 files passed, 1657 tests passed, 0 assertion failures

replacementCi.requirement: The replacement Node Evidence run must pass full coverage thresholds, build, and safe smoke before the N1-close review request.

screenshot.reason: This version changes test-only cross-platform normalization and evidence; it creates no HTML or UI surface.
